codeReview.summary: Feature extract-l3-l4-full successfully extracted full content for lectures 3 and 4. L3 sections meet 1500 char minimum, L4 sections meet 2000 char minimum. All validation assertions pass. Content includes proper markdown formatting (headers, code blocks) and assembly syntax (MOV, ADD, SUB, PUSH, POP, CBW, CWD, CDQ, INC, DEC, NEG, CMP, JMP, CALL, RET). The only change in commit 4639e41 was updating l4-s5 content to include CDQ instruction and minor formatting fixes.

VAL-SECTION-003.evidence: All sections have id, lectureId, title, content fields

VAL-SECTION-004.evidence: No duplicate section IDs found per lecture

VAL-DUPLICATE-001.evidence: All section IDs are globally unique

MARKDOWN_FORMATTING.evidence: All L3 and L4 sections have headers (##) and code blocks (```asm)
